width.$description: Stepper step indicator (circle) border width, applied to incomplete (default) steps.

_.$description: Stepper step indicator (circle) background color for incomplete (default) and pending steps.

completed.$description: Stepper step indicator (circle) background color for completed steps.

error.$description: Stepper step indicator (circle) background color for steps in an error state.

selected.$description: Stepper step indicator (circle) background color for the current/active step.

border.$description: Stepper step indicator (circle) border color for incomplete (default) steps.

_.$description: Stepper step number text color inside the step indicator (circle) for incomplete (default) and pending steps.

selected.$description: Stepper step label text color for the current/active and completed steps.
Stepper step number text color inside the step indicator (circle) for the current/active step.

_.$description: Stepper connector line color between steps.

completed.$description: Stepper connector line color following a completed step.

weight.$description: Stepper step number and label font weight.
